long_description: Due to BNPP MZR DNS configuration where traffic is sent to a small number of VPCs in the MZR, and that traffic is then forwarded to Fabric Classic resolvers, during periods where there is a spike in DNS query rate, that traffic is hitting rate limits on the Classic resolvers.
close_notes: Rate limiting on the Classic DNS resolvers removed for BNPP resolver IPs
current_status_next_steps: Rate limiting removed through Emergency Change CHG14194884 to unbind DNSRateLimitPolicy on the RSLB pairs on par04/05/06.
customer_facing_impact: Customers may have encountered a delay and retries on DNS queries when there was a spike in DNS queries during the time of the incident.
